signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (front)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (rear)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (left)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (right)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: Charger state
signals.operating_text: 0 : WAITING 1 : READY TO CHARGE ( 01 ) 2 : CHARGING ( 02 ) 3 : FAULT ( 03 )

signals.name: CHARGER STATUS
signals.operating_text: 0: 미사용, 1: 충전대기, 2: 충전중, 3: 충전완료, 4: 보상충전중, 5: 충전에러, 6: 충전경고, 7~15: 미사용

signals.name: Charging Mode
signals.operating_text: 0 : Current Mode 1 : Voltage Mode 충전시 항상 Voltage Mode로 동작할 것

signals.name: Warn code
signals.operating_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - INPUT OVER VOLT 2: WARNING - INPUT UNDER VOLT 3: WARNING - OVER TEMP 4: WARNING - LOW TEMP 5: WARNING - 5V 1CH OVER CURRENT 6. WARNING - 5V 2CH OVER CURRENT 7. WARRING - 12V 1CH OVER CURRENT 8. WARRING - 12V 2CH OVER CURRENT 9. WARNING - 24V 1CH OVER CURRENT 10~ 미사용, always 0

signals.name: Error code
signals.operating_text: 0: 에러없음, 1: FAULT - ADCU CAN COMM. 2: FAULT - BATTERY PACK CAN COMM. 3: FAULT - VCU CAN COMM. 4: FAULT - DCDC CONVERTER CAN COMM. 5~ 미사용

signals.name: Warn code
signals.operating_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - CHARGER CAN COMM. 2~ 미사용

signals.name: Source
signals.operating_text: 0: remote controller / 1: ADCU (MANUAL) / 2. ADCU ( AUTONOMOUS DRIVING )

signals.name: Velocity
signals.description: 외륜 기준, 조향 및 모드에 따라 최대치 기반으로 나머지 바퀴들의 속도 조절

signals.name: Steering
signals.description: 내륜 기준, 조향 및 모드에 따라 최대치 기반으로 나머지 바퀴들의 조향각 조절

signals.name: Driving mode
signals.description: 0: 긴급 정지, 1: 운동 유지, 2: 전륜조향모드, 3: 전륜조향모드(반대), 4: 사륜조향모드, 5: 사륜조향모드(반대), 6: 수평이동모드, 7: 제자리회전모드, 8~: reserved

signals.name: CRC
signals.description: Cyclical Redundancy Check = Byte 0 + Byte 1 + Byte 2 + Byte 3 + Byte 4 + Byte 5 + Byte 6 + Byte 7_LSB

signals.name: LED index begin
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 시작 (시작 index 가 끝보다 큰 경우 시작 index LED 에서 마지막 LED까지)

signals.name: LED index end
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 끝 (끝 index가 시작 index보다 작은 경우 0번째 LED 에서 끝 index LED까지)

signals.name: LED index begin
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 시작 (시작 index 가 끝보다 큰 경우 시작 index LED 에서 마지막 LED까지)

signals.name: LED index end
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 끝 (끝 index가 시작 index보다 작은 경우 0번째 LED 에서 끝 index LED까지)

signals.name: LED index begin
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 시작 (시작 index 가 끝보다 큰 경우 시작 index LED 에서 마지막 LED까지)

signals.name: LED index end
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 끝 (끝 index가 시작 index보다 작은 경우 0번째 LED 에서 끝 index LED까지)

signals.name: Error code
signals.operating_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 101,121,141,161 - TRACTION MOTOR CAN ERROR 102,122,142,162 - TRACTION MOTOR ENCODER ERROR 103,123,143,163 - TRACTION MOTOR OVER TEMP 104,124,144,164 - TRACTION MOTOR TEMP SENSOR ERROR 105,125,145,165 - TRACTION MOTOR CONTROLLER OVER TEMP 106,126,146,166 - TRACTION MOTOR CONTROLLER UNDER TEMP 107,127,147,167 - TRACTION MOTOR OVER CURRENT 108,128,148,168 - TRACTION MOTOR MISCELLANEOUS ERRORS 109,129,149,169 - STEERING MOTOR CAN ERROR 110,130,150,170 - STEERING MOTOR ENCODER ERROR 111,131,151,171 - STEERING MOTOR OVER TEMP 112,132,152,172 - STEERING MOTOR OVER CURRENT 113,133,153,173 - STEERING MOTOR MISCELLANEOUS ERRORS 114,134,154,174 - STEERING MOTOR CONTROLLER OVER TEMP 115,135,155,175 - STEERING MOTOR HOME REFERENCE TOLERANCE FAULT 116,136,156,176 - STEERING MOTOR MISCELLANEOUS ERRORS

signals.name: Warn code
signals.operating_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - DATA RATE ( 01 )

signals.name: Error code
signals.operating_text: 0: FAULT - NORMAL STATE 1: FAULT - DATA RECIVE ERROR ( 01 )
